Package de.dlr.proseo.model

Class TimerOrderTrigger

java.lang.Object
de.dlr.proseo.model.PersistentObject
de.dlr.proseo.model.OrderTrigger
de.dlr.proseo.model.TimerOrderTrigger
Direct Known Subclasses:
CalendarOrderTrigger, TimeIntervalOrderTrigger
@MappedSuperclass public abstract class TimerOrderTrigger extends OrderTrigger
Base class for triggers which fire upon reaching a certain point in time
Since:
prosEO 2.1.0
Author:
Dr. Thomas Bassler
